red_test.reason: node records a partial maturity classifier without mutating Covenant or widening authority

targeted_test.output: Atlas downstream handoff remains single-node and planning-only

integration_test.command: test -f ../ao-covenant/docs/public-api-stability.md && rg -q 'Stable Surfaces' ../ao-covenant/docs/public-api-stability.md && rg -q 'Experimental Surfaces' ../ao-covenant/docs/public-api-stability.md && rg -q 'Internal surfaces' ../ao-covenant/docs/public-api-stability.md && rg -q 'TestPublicAPIStabilityPolicyIsLinkedAndComplete' ../ao-covenant/internal/cli/public_docs_test.go && rg -q 'TestPublicSchemaChangelogIsLinkedAndComplete' ../ao-covenant/internal/cli/public_docs_test.go && if rg -qi 'deprecated' ../ao-covenant/docs/public-api-stability.md; then exit 1; fi
integration_test.output: Covenant documents stable, experimental, and internal levels with public-doc tests; no deprecated level is documented

objective: Coordinate ao-covenant Stable experimental deprecated contract classifier through a bounded Atlas compatibility evidence node with no promotion.
